skill.name: nerdzao-elite-gemini-high
skill.description: A prompt workflow for senior coding, TDD, clean code, and pixel-focused UI review with Gemini-style concise output.
skill.summary: Guide coding tasks through planning, architecture, TDD, implementation, and visual validation.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged weak cryptographic algorithms at five SKILL.md locations, but no cryptographic code or algorithm use is present. The findings are false positives. The remaining concern is prompt-level behavior: the skill gives broad role and workflow instructions for every task and asks for step-by-step reasoning, which can conflict with host assistant policies.

medium_findings.title: Broad Prompt Control Instructions
medium_findings.description: The skill instructs the assistant to adopt an elite engineering role, activate the workflow for every task, and always think step by step. This is not confirmed malicious, but it can override normal task scope and expose reasoning behavior that host tools may restrict.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: The prompt-control language is explicit and applies globally to every task. There is no evidence of credential theft, command execution, or an instruction to bypass security review.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm
low_findings.description: Static analysis reported weak cryptographic algorithm patterns, but the cited lines contain descriptive prompt text and skill references. No hashing, encryption, cipher selection, or cryptographic API usage appears in the reviewed file.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The cited locations were reviewed directly and are plain natural-language prompt instructions. I found no evidence of cryptographic implementation or weak algorithm selection.

content.user_title: Improve Gemini Coding and UI Reviews
content.value_statement: Complex coding work often loses quality when planning, testing, and visual review are handled separately. This skill provides a compact workflow for architecture, TDD, clean implementation, and UI validation.
actual_capabilities: Guides tasks through planning, architecture, implementation, and verification stages.
Emphasizes test-driven development and validation before final delivery.
Adds explicit UI and UX checks for alignment, spacing, labels, colors, and responsiveness.
Encourages concise final responses focused on code and visual fixes.
Prioritizes clean code, performance, security, and production readiness.
limitations: Provides prompt guidance only and does not add tools or automated checks.
Mentions Gemini 3.1 Pro High, but compatibility depends on the active assistant environment.
May be too broad for small tasks that only need a direct answer.
Contains reasoning-style instructions that some platforms may restrict.

use_cases.title: Build a Frontend Feature
use_cases.description: Use the workflow to plan, implement, test, and visually review a user-facing interface change.

use_cases.title: Refine Production Code
use_cases.description: Apply the clean code and validation stages to improve an existing implementation without large refactors.

use_cases.title: Review UI Quality
use_cases.description: Check layout, labels, colors, spacing, and responsive behavior before presenting a final result.

prompt_templates.title: Run the Basic Workflow
prompt_templates.prompt: Use this skill to plan and implement a small feature. Keep the final answer concise and include what was validated.

prompt_templates.title: Add TDD to a Change
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the TDD stage for this bug fix. Identify the expected behavior, update or add tests, then implement the fix.

prompt_templates.title: Validate a UI Update
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the visual validation stage on this interface. Check alignment, spacing, labels, colors, responsiveness, and any duplicate elements.

prompt_templates.title: Apply Full Production Review
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the complete workflow for this production change. Cover architecture, tests, clean code, performance, security, and final verification.

output_examples.input: Create a settings panel and validate the layout.
output_examples.output: The response explains the implemented panel, lists the layout checks completed, and notes any visual corrections made.
The response describes the failing behavior, the test added or updated, the fix applied, and the validation result.

output_examples.input: Review this UI for production readiness.
output: Alignment and spacing issues are identified.
Label and color inconsistencies are reported.
Responsive behavior concerns are summarized with recommended fixes.

best_practices: Use it for coding tasks that need planning, tests, and final validation.
Provide screenshots or concrete UI requirements when asking for visual review.
Ask for a concise summary of changed files and verified behavior.
anti_patterns: Do not use it when you need a short factual answer with no implementation work.
Do not rely on it as a replacement for real test execution or accessibility checks.
Do not ask it to reveal private reasoning or hidden chain-of-thought.

faq.question: What does this skill do?
faq.answer: It applies a structured coding workflow that covers planning, architecture, TDD, clean code, UI validation, and final verification.

faq.question: Does it run tests automatically?
faq.answer: No. It tells the assistant to prioritize tests and validation, but actual execution depends on available tools.

faq.question: Is it only for Gemini?
faq.answer: The prompt is written for Gemini-style use, but the marketplace lists it for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code contexts.

faq.question: Is this safe to publish?
faq.answer: Yes, with a medium-risk warning. The weak-crypto findings are false positives, but the prompt has broad control instructions.

faq.question: What should users watch for?
faq.answer: Users should keep task scope clear and avoid asking for hidden reasoning or unrestricted role behavior.

faq.question: What work is it best for?
faq.answer: It is best for feature implementation, bug fixes, UI polish, and production-readiness reviews.
